title: OCI hooks require a wildcard commands match
body:
I tried to use the following hook with current `master` of `podman`:
```json
{
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "hook": {
        "path": "/usr/bin/nvidia-container-runtime-hook",
        "args": ["nvidia-container-runtime-hook", "prestart"],
        "env": [
            "PATH=/usr/local/sbin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/sbin:/usr/bin:/sbin:/bin"                                                                                                                                                                                                
        ]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      
    },                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    "when": {                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  
        "always": true                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    },                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         
    "stages": ["prestart"]                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
}
```

But I got the following:
```
DEBU[0000] hook oci-nvidia-hook.json did not match 
```

This is coming from this part:
https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/75588a4333aef6a3830cd120136a664418d336e9/pkg/hooks/1.0.0/when.go#L77-L92
If there is no `commands` regex in the configuration file, this part of the code will return `false`, despite the `always` above.
A workaround is to add `"commands": [".*"]` to the json for now.

Probably this first line needs to be changed to something like:
```golang
if config.Process != nil && len(when.Commands) > 0 {
```
Sorry, can't do the patch myself right now.

comments.body: Verified locally. Should have a PR out to fix in a few minutes.
